TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Rahaw, title = Rahaw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rahaw} }

S.FORM: = Alang Lahaw(Rahaw) = Ngayan saya: Alang Lahaw(Rahaw) Snnaaxan alang Dheran ppyahan qqhuni, kiya tnngayun Lahaw. Niqun saya Sinrocun Censu Syang Sincusen Gnyusan dheran Ga tnarac tghunac lmiqu cceka ruru Furu. 1.8 km tnarac tghunac ruru Furu. Ratuc pkdkilan Theran kteetu Alang nYencuming Tayalcu Srengo kari Pskari Tayal, kari Plmukan. Pnyahan alang Cbeyo han pneeyah ssiyo Tapacensan ka seediq alang Lahaw. Mngeela musa mtheruy tguiril na Pisukowan nTayyakanse. Bobo na ka dehuk thunac na Pasu Ritongsan. Anu dheran qahan uka pphmaan, musa Lahaw duma, ma musa Meyen duma mswae daha nsaan di. Pnyahan pnatas pkdkilan ÁĒüśÖčÁíįŚĘÉ Gaya Tayal-Tnheruy pnkrana alang
S.PHON: = alaŇč lańßaw(…ĺańßaw) = Ňčajan saja: alaŇč lańßaw(…ĺańßaw) snnaaxan alaŇč dńß…ô…ĺan ppjańßan qqńßuni, kija tnŇčajun lańßaw. niqun saja sin…ĺo ¶un ¶…ônsu sjaŇč sin ¶us…ôn gnjusan dńß…ô…ĺan ga tna…ĺa ¶ tgńßuna ¶ lmiqu ¶ ¶…ôka …ĺu…ĺu *u…ĺu. *.* km tna…ĺa ¶ tgńßuna ¶ …ĺu…ĺu *u…ĺu. …ĺatu ¶ pkdkilan tńß…ô…ĺan kt…ô…ôtu alaŇč nj…ôn ¶umiŇč tajal ¶u s…ĺ…ôŇčo ka…ĺi pska…ĺi tajal, ka…ĺi plmukan. pnjańßan alaŇč ¶b…ôo ńßan pn…ô…ôańß ssijo tapa ¶…ônsan ka s…ô…ôdiq alaŇč lańßaw. mŇč…ô…ôla musa mtńß…ô…ĺuj tgui…ĺil na pisukowan ntajjakans…ô. bobo na ka d…ôńßuk tńßuna ¶ na pasu …ĺitoŇčsan. anu dńß…ô…ĺan qańßan uka ppńßmaan, musa lańßaw duma, ma musa m…ô…ôn duma mswa…ô dańßa nsaan di. pnjańßan pnatas pkdkilan **** gaja tajal-tnńß…ô…ĺuj pnk…ĺana alaŇč
S.FORM: = Alang Lahaw(Rahaw) = Ngayan saya: Alang Lahaw(Rahaw) Snnaaxan alang Dheran ppyahan qqhuni, kiya tnngayun Lahaw. Niqun saya Sinrocun Censu Syang Sincusen Gnyusan dheran Ga tnarac tghunac lmiqu cceka ruru Furu. 1.8 km tnarac tghunac ruru Furu. Ratuc pkdkilan Theran kteetu Alang nYencuming Tayalcu Srengo kari Pskari Tayal, kari Plmukan. Pnyahan alang Cbeyo han pneeyah ssiyo Tapacensan ka seediq alang Lahaw. Mngeela musa mtheruy tguiril na Pisukowan nTayyakanse. Bobo na ka dehuk thunac na Pasu Ritongsan. Anu dheran qahan uka pphmaan, musa Lahaw duma, ma musa Meyen duma mswae daha nsaan di. Pnyahan pnatas pkdkilan ÁĒüśÖčÁíįŚĘÉ Gaya Tayal-Tnheruy pnkrana alang
